description_long: This is a compact, retro-style diner booth couch with a high, straight backrest and a wide, flat seat. The upholstery features alternating vertical panels of muted red and light gray faux leather, with visible wear and some scuff marks, especially on the backrest and rear. The seat and backrest are both thickly padded, providing a soft, comfortable sitting surface. The base of the couch is a solid black plinth, likely made of wood or composite material, giving the piece a sturdy foundation. The couch has no visible armrests, and the legs are completely hidden by the base. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as diners, waiting areas, or public lobbies.
description: A retro diner booth couch with red and gray faux leather panels, thick padding, and a solid black base, showing signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the two-tone vertical panel upholstery, thick seat, and high backrest with visible scuffs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the straight backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid red back panel with scuff marks and the black base, with no visible cushions or detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the seat's thickness and the straight, simple profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two integrated seat cushions and two vertical backrest panels, all attached and padded, with no loose or accent pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery features alternating vertical panels of solid red and gray faux leather with visible wear and minor scuff marks.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are fully hidden by a solid black plinth base, with no exposed or decorative leg elements visible.
attribute_armrest_design: No armrests are present; the sides are straight and flush with the seat and backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, attached backrest divided into two vertical padded panels, with visible wear and no tufting or decorative stitching.
